Headline: Temporary Reroute at California & Grace
ShortDescription: 93 buses are temporarily rerouted via Addison, Western, Irving Park, Addison, California, over regular route, near California & Grace.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
93 buses are temporarily rerouted via Addison, Western, Irving Park, Addison, California, over regular route, due to flooded viaduct near California & Grace.

Southbound in reverse

Allow extra travel time.
